title: Table Padding and Spacing
content:
### Table Padding and Spacing

---

### Cell Padding

Padding is the space **inside** a cell, between the border and the content:

```html
<style>
  th, td {
    padding: 15px;
  }
</style>

<!-- Different padding on each side -->
<style>
  th, td {
    padding-top: 10px;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
    padding-left: 30px;
    padding-right: 5px;
  }
</style>
```

---

### Cell Spacing (border-spacing)

Spacing is the space **between** cells (only works with `border-collapse: separate`):

```html
<style>
  table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 10px;
  }
</style>
```

---

### Padding vs Spacing

| Property | Where |
|----------|-------|
| `padding` | Inside cells |
| `border-spacing` | Between cells (separate mode only) |
| `margin` | Outside cells (does not work on `<td>`) |

---

### Padding Shorthand

```html
<style>
  td {
    padding: 10px;            /* All sides */
    padding: 10px 20px;       /* Top/bottom 10, left/right 20 */
    padding: 10px 15px 20px;  /* Top 10, sides 15, bottom 20 */
    padding: 10px 5px 15px 20px; /* Top, right, bottom, left */
  }
</style>
```

---

### Content Alignment

```html
<style>
  td {
    text-align: center;    /* Horizontal: left, center, right */
    vertical-align: middle; /* Vertical: top, middle, bottom */
  }
</style>
```

> **Best Practice:** Consistent padding (10-15px) improves table readability. Use alternating row colors (`:nth-child(even)`) for better readability.
